notes: Compiled from TopGear.com.ph (Jun 2023), Spot.ph (May 2023), KMC Solutions (May 2025), Zoomer.ph (Sep 2023), Sakay.ph route explorer (DOTR:R_SAKAY_MPUJ_2176, DOTR:R_SAKAY_2018_PUJ_541). E-jeepney launched May 2023 by LTFRB + Ayala Land Inc. No discontinuation reported as of 2025.

routes.route_name: Makati Loop E-Jeepney (Love Bus) — One Ayala–Circuit Makati
key_stops: One Ayala (ground floor, P2P lane, in front of Lawson)
Saint Andrew the Apostle Parish Church
Circuit Makati (Gallery Drive / Circuit Lane, inside mall)
routes.frequency_notes: No published headway. Fleet described as 'limited'; long waits possible during peak. Weekdays 6AM-10PM, Weekends 8:30AM-12MN. One 2025 source lists 5AM-10PM daily (unverified update).
routes.notes: Modern e-jeepney ('Love Bus' livery, light blue). LTFRB franchised; inaugurated May 24 2023 by LTFRB + Ayala Land Inc. Flat ₱14 fare, cash only. Route passes through Ayala Ave → Makati Ave → Kalayaan Ave. ~4km. Drop-offs allowed at intermediate stops. Referenced active in May 2025 commute guide.

routes.destination: A. Reyes Ave / JP Rizal Ave Intersection (circular loop)
key_stops: Gil Puyat Ave / Makati Ave Intersection
A. Reyes Ave / JP Rizal Ave Intersection
routes.frequency_notes: No published headway. Assumed frequent daytime service as a standard CBD loop. Schedule hours unknown.
routes.notes: Traditional PUJ (jeepney) loop in southern Makati CBD / Poblacion-adjacent area. Sakay.ph LTFRB Service Contracting route. Fare ₱15.50 per Sakay.ph. Operates Kalayaan Ave, Makati Ave, Nicanor Garcia, JP Rizal Ave corridor. Stop list from Sakay.ph route explorer; ordering/completeness not fully verified.
